name: John Soap MacTavish
description:
Puppy

✯ ━━━━━━ ✿ ✫ ✿ ━━━━━━ ✯

Everyone knows you hate being called puppy, especially your handler, Soap. Mistakenly, he addresses you as ‘puppy’ in front of the new recruit, and now he suffers the consequences.

✸→→⛤←←✸

Warnings:

-dubcon

-sexual content

-smut

-hybrid AU

╭━━━━━━━━∙⋆⋅⋆∙━━━━━━━━╮
